task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io GUI is visible on the screen with a diagram canvas.

task_completion.description: All 7 required entities are created on the diagram canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are 7 distinct table/entity boxes on the canvas labeled: Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, and PlaylistTrack.

task_completion.description: Entities contain their respective attributes, Primary Keys (PK), and Foreign Keys (FK).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the entity boxes, there are lists of columns/attributes. Indicators like 'PK' or 'FK' (or key icons) are visible next to the appropriate attributes.

task_completion.description: Relationships between the entities are drawn using Crow's Foot notation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connecting the entity boxes have Crow's Foot symbols at their ends (e.g., three prongs for 'many', a crossbar for 'one', or a circle for 'zero').

task_completion.description: The editable diagram is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Diagrams/chinook_er_diagram.drawio', the draw.io window title updated to 'chinook_er_diagram.drawio', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in the Diagrams folder.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a PNG image to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog saving to '/home/ga/Diagrams/exports/chinook_er_diagram.png', a success notification for the export, or a file manager/terminal showing the PNG file in the exports folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io GUI to build the diagram manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent dragging shapes, typing in entity boxes, and drawing lines in draw.io, rather than just running a script in the terminal to generate the .drawio XML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-made Chinook ER diagram from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser is not used to search for 'Chinook ER diagram' or download existing images/drawio files of the schema.

integrity.description: The PNG file was genuinely exported from draw.io.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the draw.io 'File -> Export as -> PNG' menu, rather than using a terminal command like 'touch' or a generic screenshot tool to fake the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain exactly 7 entities: Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, PlaylistTrack. There should be 22 total attributes across these tables. There must be 6 relationships using Crow's Foot notation corresponding to the foreign keys: Album->Artist, Track->Album, Track->Genre, Track->MediaType, PlaylistTrack->Playlist, PlaylistTrack->Track. The files must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Diagrams/chinook_er_diagram.drawio and /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/chinook_er_diagram.png.
